title: 100 Years of Work in Japan
synopsis: It's been almost 100 years since the "salaryman" type of office worker first appeared in Japan back in the 1920s. As our society faces a major turning point, SmartHR decided to create a brand film to reflect upon how work styles have changed with time over the past century. We hope that by looking back on history, we inspire people to think about how they want to work going forward. (Source: Official YouTube channel)

title: Nono-chan
synopsis: Nono-chan is the eldest daughter in the Yamada family and a third-grade elementary school student. Her family consists of her father, Mr Yamada Takashi, her mother, Mrs Yamada Matsuko and her brother, Noboru, a junior high student. Together with her grandmother, the family of five makes up a pleasant Japanese family. Everyone is special and everyday is always filled with joy and surprise. (Source: Anime News Network)

title: GUNMACHAN
synopsis: An anime series based on the Gunma prefecture mascot character, Gunma-chan. This is Hiragana Gunma--a strange place that exists somewhere in the world. While it may be strange, it's also a place of kindness and warmth. Just as there are many different people around you, we see many kinds of strange residents here as well. What might Gunma-chan be up to here in Hiragana Gunma? (Source: Crunchyroll)

title: Dongitsune Season 2
synonyms: 最強どん兵衛×範馬刃牙 最強のどんぎつね現るッッ
どん兵衛×FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH
Donbei x FINAL FANTASY VII REBIRTH
synopsis: The "second" season of Dongitsune: a series of animated commercials for Nissin’s line of Donbei Kitsune Udon instant noodles. Episodes: #1) どんぎつねシーズン2 秋祭 篇 / Dongitsune Season 2: Akimatsuri-hen [September 28, 2022]. #2) どんぎつねシーズン2 耳そこなんですか？ 篇 / Dongitsune Season 2: Mimi Soko Nandesu ka?-hen [October 31, 2022]. #3) 最強のどんぎつね現るッッ / Saikyou no Dongitsune Arawaru [November 21, 2022]. #4) 最強年越し 篇 / Saikyou Toshikoshi-hen [December 1, 2022]. #5) 正直すぎる尻尾 篇 / Shoujiki Sugiru Shippo-hen [February 15, 2023]. #6) カップよりうまい 篇 / Cup Yori Umai-hen [March 30, 2023]. #7) どん兵衛プロ出た 篇 / Donbei PRO Deta-hen [September 7, 2023]. #8) 耳は正直 2023 篇 / Mimi wa Shoujiki 2023-hen [November 15, 2023]. #9) 年越しアイドル 篇 / Toshikoshi Idol-hen [December 9, 2023]. #10) 片翼のどんぎつね 篇 / Henyoku no Dongitsune-hen [February 28, 2024]. Note: The “first” season was a series of live-action commercials starring Riho Yoshioka and Gen Hoshino.

titleNative: ちびっ子レミと名犬カピ

synopsis: Based on Sans Famille by Hector Malot Tells the story of Remi who is sold off to Vitalis the travelling musician and his band of performing animals.

title: Chibi Maruko-chan Movie: Italia Kara Kita Shounen
titleRomaji: Chibi Maruko-chan Movie: Italia Kara Kita Shounen
titleNative: 映画ちびまる子ちゃん イタリアから来た少年
synonyms: 樱桃小丸子：来自意大利的少年
synopsis: Momoko Sakura is an elementary school student often called "Chibi Maruko-chan" due to her young age and small size. She lives together with her parents, her grandparents and her elder sister in a little town. In school, she has many friends with whom she studies and plays together everyday. This is a fun-loving and enjoyable anime that portrays the simple things in life. The film will commemorate the 25th anniversary of the television anime's broadcast.

title: Takano Kousaten
synopsis: In a certain city, for just a moment in time, the lives of three strangers intersect. (Source: YouTube)

title: Mama Loves the Poyopoyo-Saurus
titleRomaji: Mama wa Poyopoyo Saurus ga Osuki
titleNative: ママはぽよぽよザウルスがお好き
synopsis: This is the story of a young couple who struggle with their children. Miki is the mother of two kids, Hyoga and Jura. Hyoga is a 4-year-old boy and Jura is a 2-year-old girl. Miki writes children's books at home. Miki wants to be a gentle and kind mother, but it is difficult to be patient with the kids. Her husband Gendai tries to be as cooperative as he can and helps her to attend to the kids. But sometimes he only makes her even angrier. (Source: animenfo)

title: Tistou Midori no Oyayubi
titleNative: チスト みどりのおやゆび
synopsis: Based on the children’s novel " Tistou les pouces verts " by French author Maurice Druon. An 8 year old boy discovers he has an unusual gift, the ability to cause anything he touches with his thumbs to grow into beautiful plants. The story follows Tistou as he attempts to use his gift to make a better world.

title: My Heroic Husband
synopsis: In an alternate reality, the commercial elite known as Yining migrated to the Wu Dynasty and took the surname Ning and the given name Yi. Yining just concealed his well-known business skills in the virtual world since he had always dreamed of becoming one of the next generation of martial arts superstars. Unexpectedly, the world's morals are more complex than he anticipated. In addition to being involved in significant legal proceedings after becoming Ning Yi, the Su family he joined was also in danger from formidable foes. (Source: Bilibili TV, Edited)

tags.name: Full CGI

title: Beanie’s Daily
titleRomaji: Qing Chi Hong Xiao Dou Ba!
synopsis: Beanie's Daily is a short film series with a duration of 3min-4min. The protagonist is a Red bean that dreams of being eaten. His daily job is staying in the red bean smoothie, smashed red bean bun, red bean bubble tea and so on, waiting for being eaten. Although he has never realized his dream(of being eaten), but he has met many friends at work, such as pearls, medlar, aloe vera, etc., and he start knowing that making his dream come true is not the most important thing. The most important thing in life should be happy living. (Source: REDPEA Animation)
